themes.title: User Tracking and Compliance
themes.description: Focus on building the foundational tracking capabilities while ensuring compliance with regulations.

themes.title: User Experience and Insights
themes.description: Enhance user experience through personalized recommendations and insights.

themes.title: Data Management and Export
themes.description: Implement features for data management and user consent.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the foundational features for user tracking and compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: All MVP features are implemented and pass QA with no critical issues.

milestones.name: V1 Completion
milestones.description: Enhance the product with user experience features and insights.
milestones.success_criteria: All V1 features are implemented and user feedback indicates a positive experience.

milestones.name: V2 Completion
milestones.description: Implement user data export features to enhance data management.
milestones.success_criteria: User data export feature is implemented and successfully tested with no major issues.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful implementation of MVP features.
V2 features require the completion of V1 features to ensure compatibility.

mvp.goal: Establish a robust user tracking and compliance foundation.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience with insights and recommendations.
